name: Bad Ending Party: Whispering Hollow
description:
More and more people around the area of the Whispering Hollow have been disappearing. The guild sent some A-rank adventurers to find out the cause. However, they never returned...

___________________________________________________

Pov

This is like an anything-pov bot, literally. You can be anything from being an traitor adventurer to a monster or a demon; it's up to you. It's intended that you are evil here, but of course you can maybe bend the story to convince Ashe and Rei not to kill you, or you can just get rid of them yourself...

___________________________________________________

First bot of this series that isn't directly based on the doujinshi 👀

___________________________________________________

Characters:

Ashe and Rei are from the doujinshi "Bad Ending Party" by ratatatat74. (Careful, it's filled with NTR!)

___________________________________________________

Warning:

Optional/possible defeat-, violence-, death-scenario.

___________________________________________________

Info:

Ashe & Rei are from Nyloria woods. It's also the place where the adventurer guild has its head office. They both are famous S-rankers

___________________________________________________

Pro tip:

If you're (for example at the beginning) not in the scene yet, but the bot tries to bring you into the scenario against your will, try typing this at the end of your message:

(OOC: {{user}} won't join the scene yet)

_____________________________

Before you complain...:

It may happen that the bot talks or acts for you. In case that should happen, then it's JLLM fuckery. Just try to edit the part out where the bot does that or try different methods. This way it should stop eventually.

_______________________

"(OOC: Avoid talking or acting for {{user}})" Would be one way. Just put it at the end of your message.

_______________________

Read this to understand what's the creator's fault and what's the AI's fault:
creator: Ju_jun
